high_risk_strategy.primary_action: Personalized call to discuss concerns and offer
high_risk_strategy.offer: 15% discount on monthly charges for the next 6 months
talking_points: We understand you're on a month-to-month contract and may be considering other options due to recent charge increases
Our fiber optic internet service provides the fastest and most reliable connection, which is especially important for seniors who may rely on it for critical services
We're willing to offer a 15% discount on your monthly charges for the next 6 months to demonstrate our commitment to your satisfaction
high_risk_strategy.reasoning: Given the high churn probability and short tenure, a personalized call with a specific offer addressing the customer's concerns is crucial to retain them, especially considering their senior status and potential reliance on our services

medium_risk_strategy.primary_action: Offer a contract upgrade with a promotional discount
medium_risk_strategy.offer: 15% discount on monthly charges for 12 months with a 1-year contract
talking_points: We've noticed you're on a month-to-month contract and want to ensure you have the best options available, considering your 4-month tenure with us
You're already benefiting from our Online Security feature, which provides an additional layer of protection for your internet activities
By signing a 1-year contract, you'll not only get a 15% discount on your monthly charges but also have the assurance of a stable and secure internet connection
medium_risk_strategy.reasoning: The customer's high churn probability due to contract type and short tenure suggests a need for a more stable and cost-effective solution, which a promotional contract offer can provide, while also addressing the lack of tech support by highlighting the value of existing services like Online Security
